title: STM32 Edge AI Smart Camera
description: Deploying lightweight convolutional neural networks on STM32 microcontrollers for real-time edge object detection and gesture recognition.

title: Distributed Avionics Telemetry System
description: Highly-scalable real-time telemetry processing backend built on Go microservices, ingesting thousands of sensor streams concurrently with sub-millisecond latency.

title: IoT Smart Grid Cryptographic Node
description: Low-power secure mesh-networking sensor node with hardware-accelerated ARM TrustZone cryptography auditing real-time energy grid values.

title: WebGL Real-time Telemetry Dashboard
description: High-performance React dashboard utilizing WebGL for rendering interactive 3D models and real-time streaming avionics visualizers.
